[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000010 1
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 1000000 1
6 1110111 6
7 1001100 3

01 0000000 a match 1 2 3 4
